examples: Voters are disillusioned with the mudslinging campaigns run by many candidates in recent years.
Folks, these nasty lies other people keep telling about my past life are nothing but mudslinging.
Have you given up mudslinging and making accusations against the great Iranian nation and its officials?
"As with most public officials, he's been the target of accusations and mudslinging, " Iowa Sen.
Tired of the mudslinging, 20% would either vote against all candidates or simply not turn out.
